display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al investigate the death of a beaten-up boxer, but the clues suggest that he appears to have neither tried to defend himself nor fought back at his killer.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Amidst several personal revelations, Arch's investigation into Gallagher comes to a head when a murdered body washes up the shore.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part Two: After another killing connected to the festival queen case, the team head to nearby Rosalie Island to follow up a new lead about a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The padre has his work cut out when the discovery of a body in a locked room prompts local speculation to mount that Kembleford is under threat of an alien invasion.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Bunty reunites with Father Brown to uncover a dark secret and mysterious goings-on at the local girls' borstal.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part Two: After another killing connected to the festival queen case, the team head to nearby Rosalie Island to follow up a new lead about a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Charlie's estranged brother is accused of the death of his recent boxing opponent, Charlie and the team wrestle with the possibility of his guilt.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mesmerising mystery series set in the 19th century. Alexander Reynolds is knifed to death at his own 60th birthday party.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: When Margaret represents a gifted 17-year-old charged with releasing classified documents, Todd is tasked with babysitting the teen hacker for the duration of the trial.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. A White Siberian tiger goes berserk and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A perplexing case for the Canadian Victorian detective. Murdoch attends a meeting for a eugenics society where the guest is the great writer, HG Wells.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is called to the scene of a fireman's death, but is knocked out while looking for the murder weapon, causing him to lose his memory and revert to his con-artist self.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan decides to transport an inmate who was his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring escape.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter turns up dead after breaking a story implicating a high-ranking official in a sex scandal, leading Carrie and Al into the murky world of newsroom politics.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island's favourite radio presenter is murdered live on air and Jack must find the culprit - while being observed by an officer from internal affairs.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. A White Siberian tiger goes berserk and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A perplexing case for the Canadian Victorian detective. Murdoch attends a meeting for a eugenics society where the guest is the great writer, HG Wells.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is called to the scene of a fireman's death, but is knocked out while looking for the murder weapon, causing him to lose his memory and revert to his con-artist self.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan decides to transport an inmate who was his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring escape.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: An ambitious reporter turns up dead after breaking a story implicating a high-ranking official in a sex scandal, leading Carrie and Al into the murky world of newsroom politics.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island's favourite radio presenter is murdered live on air and Jack must find the culprit - while being observed by an officer from internal affairs.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Flambeau is incarcerated under suspicion of murder, but denies killing his cohort Flynn, and asks Father Brown to hear his confession if he is convicted.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: Dr. Ken
programme.desc: Pat eyes a promotion and asks Ken to put a good word in for him with the CEO of Welltopia; Clark suspects Damona and Pat are dating again. S2 E20

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Sonny tells a lie. Harper goes out on a date. Cash and Eden are fractured.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Travel Guides are heading to Perth & Rottnest Island for a city trip packed with treasures found only in Western Australia.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa's new best friend creates a fantasy world so real it threatens to drive them apart. S20 E9

programme.title: Minions: The Rise Of Gru
programme.desc: The untold story of one twelve-year-old's dream to become the world's greatest supervillain. With the voices of Steve Carell and Julie Andrews. (2022).

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When Woodstone's future is put in jeopardy, Sam and Jay join forces with the ghosts to protect the mansion by securing its place in history. S5 E21

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers Ravenhall and Osborne pull over a previously charged drink driver on a hot afternoon. Their initial alcohol test turns up a positive result and the driver awaits the news.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: A young mermaid makes a deal with a sea witch to trade her beautiful voice for human legs so she can discover the world above water and impress a prince. Starring Halle Bailey. (2023)

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Season Finale: Leigh-Anne Pinnock, Harry Hill and Ricky Wilson join the regulars for a festive rendition of the popular panel show, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The last seven chefs fight for one of the five coveted black jackets; three WWE champions give the chefs their first task of the day; the chefs must put their own twist on pizza.

programme.title: Dead Ahead
programme.desc: Series Premiere: The Wharekoa whānau arrive in Aotearoa and Nate quickly makes a new friend that leads him down an unknown path that sends his whānau into a frenzy. S1 E1

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: In the second semi-final, tensions rise between the Gladiators, resulting in a scrap in the arena as four determined Contenders battle for a coveted place in the grand final.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: Night two of the Battles sees 16 artists going head-to-head to secure a coveted spot in the Knockouts.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran discovers her new boyfriend has a secret, which could cost Maxwell a fortune. S2 E9

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: This week we are at GLOW UP DAY in Otara, Fresh Dramedy shows us what happens when you take your Samoan BF home to meet your palagi parents and Fresh Beats is in Mt Wellington.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: The reckoning arrives.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is heading to Scotland to collect a 'special' Bentley that's been created by a very talented amateur.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Charlie head south for an immaculate Lotus Super 7. Derek and Jack are in Sheffield collecting a 1929 Riley Monaco and a 1924 Alvis 12/50 tourer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Sunderland to pick up a real Italian beauty - a 1972 Lancia Fulvia Zagato. Red and racy, the car has seen better days but he's still impressed.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewson's auction is a 1275 Mini GT that's come from just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Brands Hatch and Thames Traditional Boat Festival: Colin and the team welcome a Lincoln Continental with headlight woes and a VW Golf with reliability issues.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole builds a steampunk lamp from a copper electric central heating pipe and Simon O'Brien modernises a dated Welsh dresser during visits to Whitby and Shipley in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Racing driver Billy Monger gives a fellow double amputee a driving lesson and a fire engine gets pumping for the first time in years.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A Barnes Wallis catapult is fixed by volunteers, but can they bounce bombs on water like the dam busters? A Triumph car is put through its paces in a road test.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: An amazing pre-war race car, the Halford Special, is lined up to compete against a stunning Bugatti in a re-run of the first ever British Grand prix.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to rain-soaked Ripon to pick up a 1965 Ford Anglia with 33,000 miles on the clock, while Dave's loving the clean lines of a rare Renault Caravalle.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul heads to County Durham for a 1936 Singer Le Mans sports car and a 1957, one-owner Lambretta LD 150, while Derek gets his hands on a 1962 MGA MK2 Coupe.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: World War II as told by the late Laurence Olivier. Hear more about life on the British Home Front, a time of gas masks, digging for victory and evacuation.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Hampton Court Castle in Herefordshire, where items include a silver dish given to a former prime minister.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks back at memorable finds from past series, and the experts investigate whether a viewer's piece of jewellery is one of the rarest of its kind.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, there's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: World War II as told by the late Laurence Olivier. Hear more about life on the British Home Front, a time of gas masks, digging for victory and evacuation.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A vast network of Nazi bunkers buried in the Hague tells the story of the greatest battle of WWII that never was.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Hampton Court Castle in Herefordshire, where items include a silver dish given to a former prime minister.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie returns to where his boating life began, exploring London's canals on Naughty Lass. He travels through Little Venice and moors in Paddington Basin.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, there's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A City in the Forest: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a complex containing more than 1,000 structures across 25sqkm.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Atomic Threat: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A City in the Forest: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a complex containing more than 1,000 structures across 25sqkm.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Atomic Threat: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A City in the Forest: As the Red Army approached a forest in Poland toward the end of the war, they stumbled upon a complex containing more than 1,000 structures across 25sqkm.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Atomic Threat: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Secret U-Boat Base?: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson visits Laxey on the Isle of Man to discover the unusual attraction that drew Victorians to the tourist destination - the biggest waterwheel in the world.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon finds out about battles in Sri Lanka, then moves on to Bangladesh, where he hears about the fast-growing industry providing prawns for the West.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Indonesia to Australia, visiting the epicentre of the 2004 tsunami, investigating the trade in illegal pets and meeting a crocodile hunter.

programme.title: This World: The Tea Trail with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels to East African countries Kenya and Uganda to meet some of the millions of people involved in producing tea and learn more about the processes involved.

programme.title: This World: The Coffee Trail With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve heads to Vietnam to uncover the stories behind the morning pick-me-up. He travels to the central highlands, where he meets the people who grow, pick and pack coffee.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon finds out about battles in Sri Lanka, then moves on to Bangladesh, where he hears about the fast-growing industry providing prawns for the West.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Indonesia to Australia, visiting the epicentre of the 2004 tsunami, investigating the trade in illegal pets and meeting a crocodile hunter.

programme.title: This World: The Tea Trail with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels to East African countries Kenya and Uganda to meet some of the millions of people involved in producing tea and learn more about the processes involved.

programme.title: This World: The Coffee Trail With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve heads to Vietnam to uncover the stories behind the morning pick-me-up. He travels to the central highlands, where he meets the people who grow, pick and pack coffee.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving with the Boswell family. Mrs Boswell seeks the help of a psychiatrist when her entire clan is thrown into disarray by Aveline's phantom pregnancy.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian japes in the family sitcom. When Mongy the dog is accused of biting a neighbour's child, Mrs B receives a visit from the police and passionately defends the animal.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, there's trouble for Shifty, problems for Joey, Billy and Mrs Boswell, but good news for Aveline and Oswald.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian larks in Carla Lane's popular 1980s sitcom. Jack has hit the bottle. Meanwhile, Freddie is torn between his loyal wife and the passionate Lilo Lill.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: After Butterflies, writer Carla Lane returned to her native Liverpool for this family sitcom. There's a new look for Billy, a new love for Jack and a new problem for Freddie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a close-knit, Liverpudlian family. The Boswell boys are in love, and Oswald is confused by Aveline's overnight transformation into a career woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving with the Boswell family. Mrs Boswell seeks the help of a psychiatrist when her entire clan is thrown into disarray by Aveline's phantom pregnancy.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian japes in the family sitcom. When Mongy the dog is accused of biting a neighbour's child, Mrs B receives a visit from the police and passionately defends the animal.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, there's trouble for Shifty, problems for Joey, Billy and Mrs Boswell, but good news for Aveline and Oswald.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Jay Blades and the team restore a leather handbag, a wooden Noah’s Ark and a wartime doll called Mary-Lynn. S9 E1

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie are trying to complete their impressive tower stairwell. Nick and Nicole need to finish their kitchen and dining room in time for a first birthday party.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Paul and Trent want to escape their busy lives to a 600-acre conservation property, protecting endangered gum trees and native wildlife. Due to terrain challenges, it becomes a treehouse.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is disappointed with Cathy when she decides to get a boob job to impress her boyfriend, Professor Clowne.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at Stanglwirt Hotel in the Austrian Alps, owned by one family for 300 years and offering world-class sports facilities and elegant Lipizzan horses.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George fears that Weld’s losing its innocence. Brother Terry proposes to Hannah and there’s a surprise visit from a very pregnant Jan. S2 E15

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: The crew head to Opotiki for a head to head challenge to catch a snapper the closest to 70cm. With a guaranteed consequence on the line, the boys go toe to toe with the fish and each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Dairying as an escalator to farm ownership; future thinking and sustainability at the heart of decision-making for Rabbidge Farms; and developing premium ciders from New Zealand bred apples.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: On Giants’ Shoulders: A Wairarapa family farming on an historic sheep station, honours the past, prepares for the future, and enjoys a shared love of the ocean with their community.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: Season Finale: A very special occasion for Police pups Tahi and Wren, speed dating for the Biosecurity ‘O’ litter and a matching for Kauri Dieback detector Marty. S4 E10

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa simplify some traditional festive dishes that can be a bit tricky to get right with a menu that includes a gorgeous alternative to Christmas pudding.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick motors up the NSW North Coast to see how the popularity of its iconic laid-back lifestyle is shaping food and dining.
